docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TIFFANY CHERRY IS PRESENT.
